title: Topest Stainless Steel Scourer |12 Pack | Dish Washing Up Pot Scrubber | Heavy Duty Sponge Spiral Scourer Scrubbing Pad | Household Cleaning Tools Accessories
features: ★[MULTI-PURPOSE CLEANER] – Effortlessly remove stubborn stains and scales from pots, stoves, ceramic tiles, sinks, steel ware etc., with our durable stainless steel scourer scrubber.

★[POWERFUL STEEL SCOURER] – A must have household cleaning tool. This stainless-steel wool sponge features strong cleaning capacity and is ideal for tough kitchen cleaning tasks. Its spiral shape and 4.0mm thickness ensure durability and efficiency.

★[HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL]: Metal scourer is made of high-quality s 410/430 stainless steel wire with good elasticity. Built-in spiral structure makes it not easy to loosen and not easy to flake during use.
★[EXCEPTIONAL CLEANING STRENGTH]: Heavy-duty scouring pad is rust and corrosion resistant, ensuring long-lasting performance for tough kitchen cleaning tasks like ovens and grills.
★[PACK SIZE]: Pack contains 12 spiral steel scourers. Spiral cleaning ball of 30 g in weight and 4 mm in diameter.
